issue_title: Shared global args with `ignore_errors = true` with `#[command(flatten)]` and subcommands breaks `--help`
issue_body:
### Please complete the following tasks

- [x] I have searched the [discussions](https://github.com/clap-rs/clap/discussions)
- [x] I have searched the [open](https://github.com/clap-rs/clap/issues) and [rejected](https://github.com/clap-rs/clap/issues?q=is%3Aissue+label%3AS-wont-fix+is%3Aclosed) issues

### Rust Version

rustc 1.91.1 (ed61e7d7e 2025-11-07)

### Clap Version

v4.5.56

### Minimal reproducible code

cli named `min`

```rust
use std::path::PathBuf;

use clap::{Parser, command};

#[derive(Parser, Debug, Clone)]
#[command(ignore_errors = true)]
pub struct DirConfig {
    #[arg(long, global = true, value_hint = clap::ValueHint::DirPath)]
    pub root_dir: Option<PathBuf>,

    #[arg(long, global = true, value_hint = clap::ValueHint::DirPath)]
    pub src_dir: Option<PathBuf>,
}


#[derive(Parser, Debug)]
#[command(name = "min")]
#[command(version, about, long_about = None)]
pub struct Args {
    #[command(flatten)]
    pub dir_config: DirConfig,

    #[command(subcommand)]
    pub command: Commands,

}

#[derive(Parser, Debug)]
pub enum Commands {
    First(first::Args),
}

mod first {
    use clap::Parser;

    #[derive(Parser, Debug)]
    #[command(name = "first")]
    #[command(version, about, long_about = None)]
    pub struct Args {
        #[command(subcommand)]
        pub command: Commands,
    }

    #[derive(Parser, Debug)]
    pub enum Commands {
        Nested(nested::Args),
    }

    mod nested {
        use clap::Parser;

        #[derive(Parser, Debug)]
        #[command(name = "nested")]
        #[command(version, about, long_about = None)]
        pub struct Args {
        }
    }
}

fn main() {
    Args::parse();
}

```


### Steps to reproduce the bug with the above code

`min first --help`


### Actual Behaviour

```zsh
error: a subcommand is required but one was not provided

Usage: min [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

For more information, try '--help'.
```

### Expected Behaviour


if i comment out the flattened global args
```rust
pub struct Args {
    // #[command(flatten)]
    // pub dir_config: DirConfig,
```

Works
```zsh
min first --help                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
Usage: min first <COMMAND>

Commands:
  nested  
  help    Print this message or the help of the given subcommand(s)

Options:
  -h, --help     Print help
  -V, --version  Print version
```

### Additional Context

_No response_

Interestingly if i embed the global args directly without flatten, it works
```rust
pub struct Args {
    // #[command(flatten)]
    // pub dir_config: DirConfig,
    #[arg(long, global = true, value_hint = clap::ValueHint::DirPath)]
    pub root_dir: Option<PathBuf>,

    #[arg(long, global = true, value_hint = clap::ValueHint::DirPath)]
    pub src_dir: Option<PathBuf>,
```
